blocks.content: The Duke's Laboratory
Lethe meticulously examined her surroundings, maintaining an awkward silence.
There were no traces to be found.

blocks.speaker: Mercede
blocks.content: Mercede, it's been a while. How have you been?
Hiding her intense nervousness, Mercede knelt on both knees.

blocks.speaker: Mercede
blocks.content: Hello, ma'am.
The fact that she greeted Lethe instead of the duke was an unusual start.

blocks.speaker: Mercede
blocks.content: Duke.
Lethe's gaze turned cold again.

blocks.speaker: Mercede
blocks.content: What's the reason?

blocks.speaker: Mercede
blocks.content: What do you mean? If you cut off the context like that, even I can't understand.

blocks.speaker: Mercede
blocks.content: Why are you helping Yahweh?
They could deny it, but a more embarrassing situation wasn't their style.

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: There is an error in the purification system. A human broke the chains of Gehenna. I sent the chief secretary to investigate, but he got sidetracked, so I came myself.
Marguerite stroked his beard.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: So that's what happened. If Monoras had arrived first, I would have naturally sided with the Fire Management Company.
It wasn't a matter of first come, first served.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: The concept of coincidence is merely human logic. This situation is just the result of some cause that started 500 million, no, a billion years ago.
The duke originally had two choices.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: To uphold Lethe's will and maintain hell, or to uphold Satan's will and reverse the situation.
Shirone arrived first.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: The breaking of Gehenna's chains is an error to Lethe, but an opportunity to Satan.
If Jin Seong-eum's karma could be purified, the spiritual realm would reopen.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Lady Lethe.
Marguerite chose war.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: The breaking of the karma chain means human will has denied hell. It's a matter of persistence, not resolution. The era is coming to an end. Can't we watch as Satan persists?
If one assumes the unspoken premise as fact, the duke's words make sense.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Since when has hell accepted Yahweh? Or rather, why are they so obsessed with them?

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: There were those who couldn't end their hatred even for Lucifer or Behemoth. The duke is the same. I can't understand it.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Because you're not a demon.
Lethe was a manager.

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: When I was first born in hell, I was a demon with the highest abilities among the intelligent types. I fought, conquered, and researched without envy.
Marguerite recalled those times.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: I thought it was a wonderful place. A world where those who proved their strength took everything. To me, philanthropy was an illogical and even violent concept.
Lethe listened silently.

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: Then why do we hate? Because we are the illegitimate children of philanthropy. It's a systemic aspect. Before demons are born, human emotions must exist. It's a fate that arises from the priority of process handling.
As they entered the realm of management, Lethe's eyes became mechanically indifferent.

blocks.speaker: Lethe
blocks.content: That's fine up to that point. The problem is that Yahweh denies it. He is a being that reverses the process. A terrorist of the system. In layman's terms, he denies what he has done, even claiming he has done nothing wrong. That shamelessness is infuriating.
Marguerite gave a bitter smile.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Even if they can't analyze like the intelligent types, demons have that feeling from birth. But sometimes they repent. Why is that?
Lethe didn't answer.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Because they are shameless. That brazen confidence without a hint of remorse is so disgusting, hateful, and makes you want to tear them apart… But also so shameless that…
It makes you wonder if it's really true.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: Is Yahweh really not at fault? Are we misunderstanding? If they didn't abandon us, then maybe demons too…
Marguerite pointed to the ceiling.

blocks.speaker: Marguerite
blocks.content: By reversing the process of this system, can't we reach the true world?
They call it 'salvation' with feelings of disgust.
Oris was bewildered.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: This is Yupi. He inherits Satan's spirit, a royal bloodline.
The expressions of the Seven Generals changed drastically.
Royal bloodlines could rise to the rank of army commander or duke in hell's army.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: Do you know him?
Oris scratched her nose with her cat claws.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Uh? Well…
Shirone quickly answered in her place.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I received help from her earlier. She taught me the true path of a demon when I was running away in fear.
Well, it wasn't that much.
As Oris scratched her nose with her cat claws, Moonom squinted his one eye.

blocks.speaker: Moomon
blocks.content: So, what do you want? A reward for defeating the intruder?
Ishak bowed his head.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: I want to recommend Lord Yupi as the captain of the Special Task Force. Please let him lead us.
Nonsense!
Moonom smashed the table.

blocks.speaker: Moomon
blocks.content: Croseide was the strongest warrior. Do you think that weakling can replace him?
Lord Moonom.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: You can belittle me all you want. But please watch your words with Lord Yupi.
Though it was a natural thing for a demon to say, Moonom was still displeased.

blocks.speaker: Moomon
blocks.content: Hmph! That's only if he really becomes the captain. Do you think Yupi is as strong as the Seven Generals?
Ishak remained silent.
Though a royal bloodline would eventually rise to the top, he lacked experience compared to the Seven Generals.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: I think the same.
Itaka spoke with his fingers interlaced.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: I acknowledge Yupi's achievement, but the defeated enemy was an illusion. There's only one real one.
Huh?
Shirone looked back in surprise.
Execution Commander Itaka.
His earlier words proved he was the only royal bloodline among the Seven Generals.
His precision in detection matches my senses.
Though it was limited to senses.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: Let's do this. There are illusions spread throughout the city. Among them, there's one real one. I'll recommend a medal of honor to the first one who kills it.
Itaka looked at Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: And if Yupi captures the real one, I'll recommend him for the captain position in addition to the medal.
Heh, that sounds good.
Moonom readily agreed.

blocks.speaker: Moomon
blocks.content: Good for you, kid. You wouldn't have stood a chance in a direct duel with us, but this involves luck too.
Itaka's voice remained cold.

blocks.speaker: Itaka
blocks.content: Competition is fine, but don't overdo it. If it hinders the mission, I'll discipline you. If necessary, consider cooperating as four.
Six, actually.
The Seven Generals fell silent simultaneously.
There are two more in the shadows over there. They have a very quiet presence.
As soon as Shirone finished speaking, a voice came from behind Itaka.

blocks.speaker: Ilgak
blocks.content: He's got good instincts.
It was likely Night Guard Captain Ilgak and Baeksa, but they still didn't reveal themselves.

blocks.speaker: Ilgak
blocks.content: But we're out of the bet. Don't worry too much. If it looks like you'll die, we'll help.
Their presence vanished.

blocks.speaker: Moomon
blocks.content: Is it a full mobilization after a long time? With Croseide gone, the medal of honor will be mine.
Moonom prepared to deploy, but Shirone was the first to leave the tent.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go, Ishak.
The Seven Generals were stunned, and Ishak, following Shirone, was equally surprised.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: His demeanor has changed.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Compared to when he was branded a deserter, he now exuded a strong will.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Well, as a royal bloodline, it's natural for him to be passionate about competition.
Though the interpretation was wrong, Shirone was indeed taking this seriously.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: I have to find Son Yu-jung.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: The strength of the Seven Generals he had felt was not weak, but it was still overwhelming.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: If it's Son Yu-jung, it won't take her three days to devastate Laviette.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: It would also disrupt Marguerite's plans.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll skip the fakes and find the real one. You probably can't keep up, so gather the troops.
Before he could hear a response, Shirone's body turned into a flash and shot into the sky.

blocks.speaker: Ishak
blocks.content: Lord Royal…
As the Seven Generals were fully deployed, Son Yu-jung's clones began to decrease rapidly.
Hahaha! What? They're nothing!
Moonom's body, undergoing continuous biological evolution, was becoming increasingly grotesque.
Hmph!
As he shot spikes from his body, Son Yu-jung's clones within a 30-meter radius were impaled.
Screech! Screech!
The clones, writhing and screaming, soon turned into light.
Tch! All duds?
Moonom's face twisted.

blocks.speaker: Moonom
blocks.content: Even if they're fakes, they're too weak. Did Croseide really fall to these?
Though demons had no special camaraderie, they recognized and respected each other.

blocks.speaker: Moonom
blocks.content: Unforgivable.
As his toothless jaws ground together, a loud noise erupted from the other side of the building.
Sensing the abnormal impact, he turned to see a seven-story building collapsing.

blocks.speaker: Moonom
blocks.content: There?
Haaah!
Oris, with her claws dug into the ground, bared her teeth, bleeding.
In her eyes, Son Yu-jung, burning with golden light, was slowly approaching.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: She's really strong.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Her combat abilities were all top-notch, to the point where it was hard to say what was strongest.
Ricera laughed loudly.

blocks.speaker: Ricera
blocks.content: Hahaha! Serves you right, you wretched demons. Lady Son Yu-jung! Quickly tear them apart.
Despite the human's mockery, Oris remained silent.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: The one carrying that human is the real one. She's on a different level from the fakes. If left alone, the city will be destroyed.
Determined to die with the enemy, Oris braced herself, her fur standing on end.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Huh?
As Son Yu-jung tilted her head, a black shadow charged at terrifying speed.
Meow!
The time it took for the body to reach was less than half a blink of an eye.

blocks.speaker: Son Yu-jung
blocks.content: Too slow.
Son Yu-jung had already spun around and was swinging her weapon at the back of Oris's head.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Damn it.
As she lost her will to fight and resigned herself, letting go of all strength in her body…

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Huh?
In Oris's cat-like eyes, the image of a red demon appeared.
Without time to react, Shirone pushed Oris aside and lunged at Son Yu-jung.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If this is the real one…
Ordinary force wouldn't even scratch her.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll hit her directly with my true power.
As Miracle Stream compressed into a Photon Cannon, it struck Son Yu-jung's abdomen directly.
Ugh!
Hit by an irresistible force, she screamed and flew out of sight.
Watching from where she had fallen against the wall, Oris slowly turned her head.

blocks.speaker: Oris
blocks.content: Yupi?
The young demon extended a hand.

blocks.speaker: Yupi
blocks.content: Are you okay?
